findings.title: Hardcoded credentials in source code
findings.description: SMTP credentials stored as plaintext string constants at module level alongside plaintext user passwords

findings.title: Verbose error messages expose internal database path and stack trace
findings.description: Report generation endpoint returns full Python traceback, exception details, and database file path in error responses

findings.title: Debug endpoint exposes user passwords and sensitive fields
findings.description: Debug endpoint returns complete user objects including plaintext passwords to any authenticated user

findings.title: Password reset token returned in API response with internal server details
findings.description: Password reset token and internal SMTP hostname returned directly in API response instead of being sent via email

findings.title: Sensitive configuration exposed via admin endpoint
findings.description: Admin config endpoint returns all application secrets including SMTP credentials in the API response
